Q5: The AI Tutor was somewhat useful as a personal study tool.
Q7: The AI Tutor certainly has promise. However, in its current state, it can really only reiterate information from provided lecture slides and try to use that information to solve related queried problems. I didn't find it to be very capable at, say, checking to see if a complex SQL query was indeed correct; it was more so suited for explaining to me how to write a perfect SQL query rather than actually doing the work of writing or checking mine. Other chatbots have far more of an ability to "act" and "think" and combine provided data (i.e. uploaded lecture slides) with the vast resources of the Internet to produce better results in more use cases.
